About

Rushil Singh is a quality-oriented software engineering professional with over 2 years of experience and a proven knowledge of software development and automation/regression testing.

Worked in the networking domain in the fields of Software Defined Networking and Network Function Virtualization.

Specialist in Object Oriented Programming using Python programming language;well versed with RESTful application architecture; exposed to various other programming languages and paradigms. Quick to learn and adapt and pick up new languages and technologies.

Knowledgable in the fields of Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence.
